# Domus Flats Brickell Park

### **Brickell / 2026**

12 Stories / 171 Residences of
Studios, 1 & 2 Bedrooms

**1611 SW 2nd Ave, Miami, FL 33129, USA**

Average Price: $1,000 x SF ($10,764 x M2)

Domus Brickell is a 12-story luxury condo-hotel building located in Miami's upscale Brickell Area. It features 171 residences, ranging from studios to 2 bedrooms. Amenities include valet parking, cafe, coworking, fitness center, pool, sauna, and much more. Residents enjoy the benefits of short term rental of their furnished residence. Domus boasts a central location just blocks away from Miami’s urban core with panoramic views of Simpson Park looking out towards Biscayne Bay and the Downtown Miami/Brickell skyline.

[2 Condos For Sale](https://miamiresidential.com/domus#ForSale) from $585,000 to $779,000

Average Listing: $1,467 x SF ($15,787 x M2)

Average Sale: $430 x SF

Average Price: $948 X SF

Average Price: $1,000 x SF ($10,764 x M2)

## Developers

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/Domus-Developers.jpg)

North Development is a joint venture made up of two entities: Edifica from Peru and Oak capital from Miami. With the combined experience of over 100 projects, their company has a mission of being recognized as a leading real estate developer with an internationally recognized brand; they offer specialization in the ground-up development of high-rise short-term rental buildings that maximize value for investors and create comfortable experiences for guests.

# Domus Brickell Park

1611 SW 2nd Ave Miami FL 33130

Now under construction and slated for completion by the end of 2025, Domus Brickell Park is a 12-story preconstruction condo development located at 1611 SW 2nd Avenue in Miami’s dynamic Brickell neighborhood. Developed by North Development—a joint venture between Oak Capital and Edifica—this forward-thinking project will deliver 171 fully furnished FLATS (Flexible Apartments for Temporary Stays). Domus Brickell Park is designed by award-winning architecture firm Zyscovich, with interior design by hospitality-focused Urban Robot Associates. Domus Management, a North Development subsidiary, will oversee property operations with an emphasis on professional hospitality services and short-term rental efficiency.

The [floor plans at Domus Brickell Park](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/domus-brickell-park-condos/floor-plans "Domus Brickell Park floor plans") range from studios to one- and two-bedroom FLATS, with sizes spanning 330 to 975 square feet. All residences will be delivered fully finished and turnkey, featuring private balconies, premium appliances, quartz countertops, washer/dryer units, and keyless smart-lock entry. Each unit is equipped with oversized smart TVs, modern fixtures, and sound systems, offering residents a luxurious, tech-savvy experience with all the comforts of home.

Residents of Domus Brickell Park will enjoy a robust collection of resort-style amenities including a rooftop pool deck with hot tub and cabanas, state-of-the-art fitness center, steam room, café with barista, wine and beer bar, gourmet market, lush garden lounge, co-working areas, and a 4,200+ square foot lobby and gathering space. Services at Domus Brickell Park include 24-hour valet, a hospitality-trained housekeeping team, and access to the proprietary Domus App, which allows owners to connect their residences with over 85 global booking platforms and loyalty networks like Marriott Bonvoy and World of Hyatt.

Ideally situated in the heart of [Brickell](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/brickell-condos "Brickell"), Domus Brickell Park offers unbeatable walkability and proximity to top destinations. Brickell City Centre, Mary Brickell Village, and Southside Park are all within a 5-minute walk, while the Kaseya Center, PAMM, Frost Museum, and Brightline Station are less than 10 minutes away by car. The project’s central location places residents just minutes from Downtown Miami, Key Biscayne, Wynwood, and Miami Beach, making it one of the most strategically positioned new developments in the city.
